mapper.sql: ttes.course_content, ttes.activity_discussion_exercise, ttes.understanding_course, ttes.guide_think, ttes.combined_with_content, ttes.control_of_scene, ttes.reasonable_training_schedule, ttes.job_needs, ttes.absorption_understanding, ttes.goals_achieved, ttes.plan_implement_id, ttes.average_score, ttes.enabled_flag, ttes.id, ttes.create_by, ttes.update_by, ttes.create_time, ttes.update_time,ttes.trainingOpinion

${tAlias}.course_content as ${tAlias}_course_content, ${tAlias}.activity_discussion_exercise as ${tAlias}_activity_discussion_exercise, ${tAlias}.understanding_course as ${tAlias}_understanding_course, ${tAlias}.guide_think as ${tAlias}_guide_think, ${tAlias}.combined_with_content as ${tAlias}_combined_with_content, ${tAlias}.control_of_scene as ${tAlias}_control_of_scene, ${tAlias}.reasonable_training_schedule as ${tAlias}_reasonable_training_schedule, ${tAlias}.job_needs as ${tAlias}_job_needs, ${tAlias}.absorption_understanding as ${tAlias}_absorption_understanding, ${tAlias}.goals_achieved as ${tAlias}_goals_achieved, ${tAlias}.plan_implement_id as ${tAlias}_plan_implement_id, ${tAlias}.average_score as ${tAlias}_average_score, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time
mapper.insert: insert into td_training_evaluation_score (course_content, activity_discussion_exercise, understanding_course, guide_think, combined_with_content, control_of_scene, reasonable_training_schedule, job_needs, absorption_understanding, goals_achieved, plan_implement_id, average_score, enabled_flag, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time,trainingOpinion) values (#{courseContent,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{activityDiscussionExercise,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{understandingCourse,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{guideThink,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{combinedWithContent,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{controlOfScene,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{reasonableTrainingSchedule,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{jobNeeds,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{absorptionUnderstanding,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{goalsAchieved,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, (#{courseContent,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{activityDiscussionExercise,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{understandingCourse,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{guideThink,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{combinedWithContent,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{controlOfScene,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{reasonableTrainingSchedule,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{jobNeeds,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{absorptionUnderstanding,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{goalsAchieved,jdbcType=DOUBLE}) / 10, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{trainingOpinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update td_training_evaluation_score set course_content = #{courseContent,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, activity_discussion_exercise = #{activityDiscussionExercise,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, understanding_course = #{understandingCourse,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, guide_think = #{guideThink,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, combined_with_content = #{combinedWithContent,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, control_of_scene = #{controlOfScene,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, reasonable_training_schedule = #{reasonableTrainingSchedule,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, job_needs = #{jobNeeds,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, absorption_understanding = #{absorptionUnderstanding,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, goals_achieved = #{goalsAchieved,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, plan_implement_id = #{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, average_score = (#{courseContent,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{activityDiscussionExercise,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{understandingCourse,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{guideThink,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{combinedWithContent,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{controlOfScene,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{reasonableTrainingSchedule,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{jobNeeds,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{absorptionUnderstanding,jdbcType=DOUBLE} + #{goalsAchieved,jdbcType=DOUBLE}) / 10, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, trainingOpinion = #{trainingOpinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
